html:
Exclusive to:

Lawn Decorations are structures exclusive to the Hamlet DLC, spawning naturally in the Pig City Biome. They come in seven different variations, some more abundant than others.

The Lawn Decorations can be destroyed with a Hammer, however they do not get fully removed. They can be repaired again by the player using a Hammer, or by a nearby Worker Pig. To fully remove a Lawn Decoration, one must obtain the Executive Hammer from the Palace.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, all seven variations become craftable in the City Planning Tab requiring 10 Oincs each.

Trivia

  • The Lawn Decorations can also be crafted using 1 Tenpiece Oincs or 1 Centapiece Oinc. If using Centapiece Oinc, one will be returned 9 Tenpiece Oincs.
  • The crafting description is a reference to a famous Bob Ross quote "Happy Little Trees".

Gallery

  • Wilson standing near Lawn Decorations in the Pig City. Hedges and Intricate Topiary can also be seen in the image.
  • Lawn Decorations are included in the Relic Thing's Set Piece.
  • Unused Lawn Decoration
Craftable ItemsStructures

Lawn Decorations are structures exclusive to the Hamlet DLC, spawning naturally in the Pig City Biome. They come in seven different variations, some more abundant than others.
The Lawn Decorations can be destroyed with a Hammer, however they do not get fully removed. They can be repaired again by the player using a Hammer, or by a nearby Worker Pig. To fully remove a Lawn Decoration, one must obtain the Executive Hammer from the Palace.
If the player obtains the Key to the City, all seven variations become craftable in the City Planning Tab requiring 10 Oincs each.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Lawn Decorations can also be crafted using 1 Tenpiece Oincs or 1 Centapiece Oinc. If using Centapiece Oinc, one will be returned 9 Tenpiece Oincs.
The crafting description is a reference to a famous Bob Ross quote "Happy Little Trees".
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Wilson standing near Lawn Decorations in the Pig City. Hedges and Intricate Topiary can also be seen in the image.
Lawn Decorations are included in the Relic Thing's Set Piece.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trang trí Bãi cỏ là các công trình dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC, xuất hiện tự nhiên trong Quần xã Thành phố Lợn. Chúng có bảy biến thể khác nhau, một số biến thể phong phú hơn những biến thể khác.

'''Lawn Decorations''' are structures exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, spawning naturally in the [[Pig City]] [[Biome]]. They come in seven different variations, some more abundant than others.

The Lawn Decorations can be destroyed with a [[Hammer]], however they do not get fully removed. They can be repaired again by the player using a Hammer, or by a nearby [[Worker|Worker Pig]]. To fully remove a Lawn Decoration, one must obtain the [[Executive Hammer]] from the [[Palace]].

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], all seven variations become craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] requiring 10 [[Oinc]]s each.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==

* The Lawn Decorations can also be crafted using 1 [[Oinc|Tenpiece Oinc]]s or 1 [[Centapiece Oinc]]. If using Centapiece Oinc, one will be returned 9 Tenpiece Oincs.
*The crafting description is a reference to a famous Bob Ross quote "Happy Little Trees".
